## Prompt message

#### The code was generated by Gemini 3 Flash with Google AI Studio.

## Prompt : 
```{python}
# Create the initial prompt
Make an instrument app with following steps
1.draw sine function on the screen with two cycles
2.make two octave keyboard with 25 keys (C4 to C6) and produce sine wave sound
3.the sequence of keys on keyboard moves along with the sine curve like railway
4.In the same way, the user changes the shape of rail to triangle, saw, square with button to change the shape of rail. At the same time, the timbre of sound also changes to the timbre that they selected
-change hovering color to grey when a key is pressed
-dark screen, and each timbre has a different accent color
-in the header, add octave transpose button, master volume slider, the title (RAILWAY KEYBOARD WITH DIFFERENT TIMBRES) and subtitle (MUSCOM ASSIGNMENT 3)
```
```{python}
# Select one suggested UI
Apply the "Elegant Dark" design theme to the app.
```
```{python}
# Fix the direction of the keyboard
-the keys should not be separated. make the distance between each key smaller and connect them like a real train.
-the keys should move forward (left to right) in the same velocity along the line. the key which reaches to the left edge of screen should appear from the right edge of the screen.
```
```{python}
# Fix the direction of the keyboard again
-move the keys "left" to "right"
-when the key reaches the left edge of the screen, it goes out of the screen and goes in from the right edge of the screen.
```
```{python}
-when the key reaches the right edge of the screen, it goes out of the screen and goes in from the left edge of the screen.
```
```{python}
-make the key movement that go back from the right edge to left edge invisible. the key should be out of the screen, and appear from the left screen. do not show the movement from right to left.
```
```{python}
# Shorten the distance of each key to let users immediately recognize real piano design
-make the distance of each key narrower like a real piano keyboard
```
```{python}
-the key should be narrower more!
-make the amplitude of four waves three times smaller
# Align the upper edge of every key with the trajectory 
-the trajectory point of each key should be the upper part of the key. the key should be hanging from the wave.
-add velocity button ranging from 0.5 times to 3 times faster (0.5 interval)
```
```{python}
# Upgrade the UI
-remove the mane of tone from the keys
-make background color "dark version of each accent color" so that it doesn't collide with the color of black keys
-make the key smoothly slide in from left edge of the screen
```
```{python}
-fix the bug that sometimes the sound is automatically sustained even when not pressed.
```
```{python}
-add reset button to initialize the screen and bug sound
-delete the distance of white key among the black key. represent a real piano design
```
```{python}
-assign the same function as the initial screen button to "reset" button. if the reset button is pressed, initialize every adjustment and go back to the first sine screen and reset sound.
```
```{python}
# Make it more difficult to play 
make the default speed of keyboard movement twice faster
make the speed twice faster
set velocity change buttons to (0.25, 0.5, 1.0, 1.5, 2.0, 3.0, 5.0)
```
```{python}
# Increase the sensitivity of key pressed and released
sometimes the system cannot detect the signal when a key is released and sustain the note forever. increase the sensitivity of the press on and off, and make sure to turn off every audio when the reset button is pressed.
```
```{python}
# Separate every key to make it chaos
-set different velocity on each key. based on the first C4 key, the next key should be 1.1 times, 1.2 times, 1.3 times faster...
-also remove velocity change buttons on the header
```
